calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Aaron Andalman, Plaintiff/Respondent
Wrenn Levenberg, Plaintiff/Respondent
Josh Levenberg, SBN203504, Attorney for plaintiffs/respondents
Jerome Bellach, representing defendant/appellant, 9th Street Designer

The cause is called for hearing of an appeal from Small Claims Court.
All witnesses are duly sworn. The parties are instructed of trial de novo proceedings.

Plaintiff, Wrenn Levenberg testifies on her own behalf.
Plaintiff, Josh Levenberg testifies on his own behalf.
Defendant, Jerome Bellach testifies on his own behalf and for ith Street Designer Clearance.

Court views brown leather-like cushoins brought by plaintiffs as exhibits. Said cushions remain in the possession of plaintiffs after the hearing.

Court reviews file including any previously submitted exhibits. No new exhibits are merked nor offered.

Court hears arguments and takes matter under submission.
